title: High-End Graphic Fashion Poster
sourceTitle: Graphic Fashion Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end graphic fashion poster for designer streetwear fashion film, using the specific design direction variant with readable visual details direction for NOIR AVENUE. Subject: adult dancer in oversized black coat and wide-leg trousers walking through a bold color-block studio set is the main photographic or product focus, styled with Theme: streetwear, dance, fashion film, designer brand, lifestyle brand Direction: color block street poster, floral motion typography, type mask portrait, geometric space fashion poster Brand / project name: name Main and integrated into a premium fashion campaign hierarchy. Scene: Brand campaign poster environment with strong color, clean layout, realistic fashion photography, graphic color blocks, geometric structure, floral or abstract elements when needed, and clear negative space. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 premium fashion poster composition with clear image/type/space hierarchy, bold typography, clean alignment, strong negative space, and editorial layout discipline. Signature Elements: Preserved graphic fashion campaign poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Mood Keywords: graphic, modern, fresh, editorial, confident; Color Palette: orange, black, and white with restrained neutral skin tones. Style: High-end brand campaign poster, lookbook cover, editorial visual, strong graphic design, realistic fashion photography, contemporary color-block or type-mask poster language, and polished luxury design finish. Color Palette: Create a high-end graphic fashion poster with strong color, typography, fashion photography and brand mood. controls the campaign color system while preserving strong contrast, clean readability, and refined editorial restraint. Typography: MOVE WITH INTENT appears as the main title; SPRING STREET EDITORIAL appears as the short supporting line; NOIR AVENUE appears as the brand or project wordmark with readable hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
